$comment: Placeholder fixture for Phase 1.6 exemplar UC; replace with production-grade sample-data as part of Phase 4.5 sandbox validation.
description: Fixture exercising positive scenario for 22.40.1: When an IdP elevation event (role='admin' OR tag='pim-activated') is not matched by a PAM session-recording registration within 5 minutes, the UC fires naming the user, target_host, and session_id.
